name: Robinhood Markets, Inc.
description: Robinhood Markets, Inc. operates a financial services platform in the United States and internationally, allowing users to invest in stocks, exchange-traded funds, options, and cryptocurrencies. The company also offers fractional share trading, recurring investments, cash management services, and retirement accounts. Robinhood is known for pioneering commission-free trading and providing an intuitive, mobile-first user experience designed to democratize finance for all.
